title: An Ethiopian trading company serving coffee buyers with practical support.
intro: Hayked General Trading PLC presents itself as an Ethiopian company active in coffee-related trade, processing support, warehousing and export coordination.
storyTitle: Built to support clear coffee trade communication.
storyText: Hayked’s public business positioning centers on Ethiopian coffee, organized operations and dependable communication with buyers, suppliers and service partners. The company’s focus is to help commercial discussions move forward with clarity and timely follow-up.
mission: Support coffee trade relationships through clear communication, practical preparation and dependable service coordination.
vision: Be a trusted Ethiopian trading company known for reliable coffee-related service and long-term business relationships.
leadershipText: Detailed management biographies, official company profile documents and approved leadership photographs can be shared directly by Hayked during buyer or partner discussions.
